meta.title: Email System
meta.excerpt: React Email templates and SMTP notification workflows

seo.metaDescription: React Email templates and SMTP notification workflows

props.text: Documentation of the email notification system using React Email for template rendering and SMTP configuration for sending transactional and marketing emails.

props.body:
React Email templates (JSX/TSX)
• SMTP client configuration
• Email queue and retry logic
• Template rendering engine
• Delivery tracking and logging

Transactional: contact form confirmations
• Notifications: new comment alerts
• Marketing: newsletter and campaigns
• System: password reset, email verification

Folder: lib/email/templates/
• Naming: PascalCase component names
• Exports: Default function component
• Props: Interface for template variables
• Styling: Inline styles or Tailwind CSS

props.title: Contact Confirmation Template

props.body:
SMTP_HOST - Email server hostname
• SMTP_PORT - Port (typically 587 or 465)
• SMTP_USER - Email account username
• SMTP_PASSWORD - Email account password
• SMTP_FROM - From address for all emails
• SMTP_FROM_NAME - From display name

props.title: SMTP Client Setup
Basic Send Function
Usage in Server Action

props.body:
Bull Queue for background job processing
• Retry logic with exponential backoff
• Failed email logging
• Manual retry dashboard

Max attempts: 3
• Initial delay: 5 minutes
• Backoff multiplier: 2x
• Max delay: 1 hour

ContactConfirmation - User submits contact form
• NewsletterSubscription - User subscribes to newsletter
• QuotationRequest - Service quotation request confirmation
• NewsletterDigest - Weekly newsletter delivery
• PasswordReset - Password reset link
• EmailVerification - Email confirmation link
• AdminAlert - New form submission alert
